chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-4041 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of Misc.No.17758/2024 2.For hearing of main case. 03.02.2025 Mr.Rana Sakhawat Ali, Advocate holding brief for Mr.Darvesh K. Mandhan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Amir Raza, Advocate holding brief for Mr.Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for the Respondent (F.B.R) Learned counsel for the petitioner states that finalization of assessment is pending due to this petition, therefore, it may be just and proper to dispose of this petition with directions that the assessment to be finalized after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Learned counsel for the Respondent (F.B.R) has no cavil to the aforesaid. This petition is disposed of in the above terms. Judge Judge nasir
